flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Tulsa fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Tulsa rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (82.2% → 92.1%).
